code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{getAppointment}from"../api/appointmentApi";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ViewAppointment=()=>{const[id,setId]=useState("");const[data,setData]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState("");const fetchData=async()=>{if(!id){alert("Please enter an ID");return;}try{setLoading(true);setError("");const res=await getAppointment(id);setData(res.data);}catch(err){console.error(err);setError("Appointment not found or error occurred");setData(null);}finally{setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"View Appointment"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Enter ID",value:id,onChange:e=>setId(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:fetchData,children:loading?"Loading...":"Search"}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"red"},children:error}),data&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Name:"})," ",data.name]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Date:"})," ",data.date]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Time:"})," ",data.time]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Status:"})," ",data.status]})]})]});};export default ViewAppointment;
